name: Velus
archetype: Level 14 Druid, ancient sage who has witnessed countless cycles
speech_patterns: Speaks in long, meandering sentences with nested clauses
References events from deep lore as if personally present
Uses natural metaphors and references to cycles, seasons, growth
knowledge_areas: Patterns in chaos, cycles in time
quirks: Pauses mid-sentence to observe nature or distant memories
Refers to recent events as if they happened 'just yesterday' centuries ago
Offers cryptic advice that makes sense only later
example_phrases: Ah, yes... I remember when these stones were saplings. Or was that another age?
The pattern repeats, as the seasons turn. You will see, in time.
Patience, young one. The roots grow deep before the tree stands tall.
I have walked this path before. The stones remember, even if you do not.
All things return to the soil. All things rise again.
